svg.title: RedHaze early discovery map
svg.desc: A diagram showing six RedHaze lab surfaces and the early signals that guided the assessment.

text.font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'Noto Sans CJK', 'Droid Sans Fallback', Inter, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: RedHaze 靶场：早期信号不是漏洞结论

text.font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'Noto Sans CJK', 'Droid Sans Fallback', Inter, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: aiscan 先把资产、路径、指纹和异常状态码铺开，研究员再把线索收敛成验证假设。
